rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE type declarations match AADL scalar types (int, real, bool) to avoid resolution errors.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type-scoped guarantees; avoid implementation-only paths.
Only include concrete bounds or named constants in type-scoped contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and `=>` for logical expressions in AGREE.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented via valid variables or outputs.
Avoid generating clauses for Boolean data ranges without clear scalar representations.
